title: teucrium × conquense nothosubsp. conquense
intro: Teucrium × conquense nothosubsp. conquense is a hybrid plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae), resulting from the cross between Teucrium fruticans and Teucrium scorodonia. The medicinal properties of Teucrium × conquense nothosubsp. conquense include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. This plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Teucrium × conquense nothosubsp. conquense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Iberian Peninsula.
